excerpt: In this post, we'll explore how we built a proof-of-concept that converts natural language queries into executable seismic workflows while providing a question-answering capability for Halliburton's Seismic Engine tools and documentation. We'll cover the technical details of the solution, share evaluation results showing workflow acceleration of up to 95%, and discuss key learnings that can help other organizations enhance their complex technical workflows with generative AI.

title: Halliburton enhances seismic workflow creation with Amazon Bedrock and Generative AI
